LanguageChanged:
The language has been changed.
Re-open SharpAlert to see the new language everywhere.
QuitAppMessage: Are you sure you want to quit?
SetupWelcome_Description:
Get alerts easily with SharpAlert.

This setup will guide you through quickly setting up the program. You can find more customization options by right-clicking the notification icon, and clicking the "Open Settings" button.
SetupWelcome_BottomText:
To go through the setup more than once, reset the program.
Created by BunnyTub. More credits can be found in Settings.
SetupWelcome_SkipQuestion: Do you want to skip the setup wizard and start using SharpAlert with no additional questions?
RegionSettings_SetupTitle: Where do you want alerts from?
RegionSettings_IDAPCornerMessage: Having trouble with Brazil (IDAP)? Try a connection test.
GoToSettings: To change these options later, go to Settings.
